name_en: Large Size 🚩🚩🚩 OHANEL New Vintage Tree Fat Calf CF Chain Bag. I was captivated by it the moment I held it! It's a rare and super pretty color! The body features the unique Chanel logo, a vintage style that won't go out of style for 20 years. It will make you the shiniest girl wherever you go 💗. Large capacity, practical, and full of fashion sense. Size: 34×21×10cm
